nasb.text: and said to them, “Return to your tents with great riches and with very much livestock, with silver, gold, bronze, iron, and with very many clothes; divide the spoil of your enemies with your brothers.”

esv.text: he said to them, “Go back to your tents with much wealth and with very much livestock, with silver, gold, bronze, and iron, and with much clothing. Divide the spoil of your enemies with your brothers.”

cnv.text: 對他們說：“你們帶著許多財物，許多牲畜和金、銀、銅、鐵，以及許多衣服，回自己的家去吧；也要把你們從仇敵奪得的戰利品與你們的兄弟同分。”

ccb.text: 说：“现在你们带着大量的财物、牲畜、金银、铜、铁和衣物返回家园，要把从敌人那里得来的财物分给你们的弟兄。”
